raw_consumer_statement: I was charged {$440.00} from a company called XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/year>. Barclay XXXX credit card company contacted me and asked if I made this purchase, I told them no and started fraud case, they issued a new card and took charge off, after XXXX weeks charge was put back on account and they stated I had made the charge, contacted merchant and they confirmed charge was never paid from Barclay XXXX  since they held funds due to fraud, merchant asked if I had made this charge and I told them no, have tried to reopen fraud case with Barclay XXXX twice and have had no resolve to this issue. I have had to pay the {$440.00} and merchant says they never received any funds from Barclay XXXX arrival world mastercard
